autodriver_init.message0: Initialize AutoDriver %1 chain position %2 CS %3 reset %4 busy %5
autodriver_init.tooltip: Create and initialize the SparkFun AutoDriver stepper motor driver

autodriver_set_speed.tooltip: Set AutoDriver maximum speed in steps/second

autodriver_set_accel.tooltip: Set AutoDriver acceleration or deceleration rate

autodriver_set_kval.tooltip: Set AutoDriver motor voltage compensation KVAL register

autodriver_run.tooltip: Run the motor continuously at given speed and direction

autodriver_move.tooltip: Move the motor a specified number of steps

autodriver_get_position.tooltip: Get the current AutoDriver motor position

autodriver_get_status.tooltip: Get AutoDriver status register and clear all flags

autodriver_stop.tooltip: Soft or hard stop the AutoDriver motor

autodriver_hiz.tooltip: Put motor bridges into high impedance (deenergize) state

autodriver_reset_position.tooltip: Reset the current AutoDriver position to zero

autodriver_reset_device.tooltip: Perform a hard reset of the AutoDriver device
